title: Miner's Delight!
description: Makes mining more efficient, fun, and semi-automatable!
body:
# ⛏️Miner's Delight⛏️

### - This Datapack is Smithed Compatible!

Miner's Delight is a datapack made to make caving easier and more efficient by adding in several new items and even a new machine using 1.21's new datapack features

## Summary

```
-2 New Drills, which you can hold right-click on to mine a 4x4 infront of you
-A creeper alarm which notifies you when a creeper is within "Danger" Range
-Rope Ladders that extend down and place ladders, only stopping when they hit a block
-Throwable Glowsticks that stick dim torches to the wall
-A Mining Turtle that mines blocks infront of it and moves forward, 
which can be upgraded to a point it can create entire strip mines 
and mineshafts by itself. Complete with a manual
-Modules that improve said mining turtle
-A Toolbelt that increases block interaction range
-The New Snail mob which can be bred to farm slimeballs
-2 New Music Discs which can be listened to below
```
Custom Music Discs [Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dlBIfpelUos)

### Commands

Use 
```
/function md:give/
```
to obtain any item in the datapack
 
## Features

A custom advancement tree has been added which will automatically unlock new recipes for you as you craft items in the datapack. Craft the different items to find out how to make new ones and evolve

Upon joining you should unlock a couple recipes, for the Rope, Reinforced Drill, and Glowsticks

![Electric Drill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8852c616cecbc7b31c38f4d0f278d2420f76f988.jpeg)


Find Natural Ore Veins in the world that can be made of coal, copper, or even iron!

### Advice

Upon crafting a mining turtle for the first time, you will be given a manual, do not throw this away! It might be useful to you even after your first read to go back to for instructions

Always place your mining turtle on top of a hopper, as you may lag your world by sending every item it mines to one spot where it wont despawn for the next 5 minutes

The Reinforced Drill, unlike the electric drill, requires fuel to use, always carry coal on you while using it, or just switch to a electric one.

Drills can be used as weapons! They don't do much damage but have no cooldown and amazing knockback! But if you manage to pin your enemy to a wall you can shred them to bits using the drill! The electric drill twice as much damage as the Reinforced Drill

Check out the wiki! Its full of useful advice like these and gives a bit of a look into the technical details aswell

Report any bugs, or suggestions on the discord server!

### Links
